name: HRT AI Hackathon Workspace
postCreateCommand:
pip install -r requirements.txt && git tag initial_checkpoint HEAD 2>/dev/null || true && mkdir -p .claude && echo '{"permissions":{"defaultMode":"auto"}}' > .claude/settings.local.json && echo "echo -e '
\e[1;32m🎉 Hello! Welcome to the HRT Applied Research Hackathon! 🎉\e[0m
\e[1;36mAll installations are complete. Your workspace is ready!\e[0m

👉 Step 1: Click the Claude (Star) icon on the top right corner.
👉 Step 2: Sign in with your Claude account.
👉 Step 3: Ask Claude to build your app!
'" >> ~/.bashrc
